member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlEndTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method for Initialize Flow Control values per Domain.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlEndTestMethod.Mode
member.summary: Generic mode switch.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlEndTestMethod.Mode.Enabled
member.summary: Enabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlEndTestMethod.Mode.Disabled
member.summary: Disabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlEndTestMethod.DomainName
member.summary: Gets or sets the domain name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlEndTestMethod.SharedStorageKey
member.summary: Gets or sets shared storage token to set with flow value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlEndTestMethod.DffTokenName
member.summary: Gets or sets DffTokenName to set with flow value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlEndTestMethod.Datalog
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether data logging is enabled.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlForkTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method for Fork Flow based on Flow Domain values.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlForkTestMethod.DomainName
member.summary: Gets or sets Flow Control Domain Name.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlSetTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method for Set Flow Control values per Flow Domain.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlSetTestMethod.DomainName
member.summary: Gets or sets Flow Control Domain Name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlSetTestMethod.DomainValue
member.summary: Gets or sets Flow Domain Value.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlStartTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method for Initialize Flow Control values per Domain.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlStartTestMethod.DffTokenOverride
member.summary: Enum for DFF Override value TRUE or FALSE.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlStartTestMethod.DffTokenOverride.TRUE
member.summary: DFF Value Override true.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlStartTestMethod.DffTokenOverride.FALSE
member.summary: DFF Value Override false.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlStartTestMethod.DomainName
member.summary: Gets or sets Domain Name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlStartTestMethod.DefaultValue
member.summary: Gets or sets Domain Initial default Value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlStartTestMethod.DffTokenName
member.summary: Gets or sets DFF Token Name to be used as source of domain flow number.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.FlowControl.PrimeFlowControlStartTestMethod.UseDffToken
member.summary: Gets or sets DFF Token Override.
